ItacPersonItem.Notes: See Laura Riccò, La miniera accademica (2002) for a bibliography on this author. On his simpathy for religious reformers, see Rita Belladonna, in Critica storica, X, 3 (1973) and XI, 3 (1974).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
